    55→    image.onload = () => {
    56→      resolve({
    57→        width: image.naturalWidth || image.width,
    58→        height: image.naturalHeight || image.height,
    59→      })
    60→    }
    61→    image.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Failed to load image'))
    62→    image.src = src
    63→  })
    64→}
    65→
    66→function readAsDataUrl(file: File): Promise<string> {
    67→  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    68→    const reader = new FileReader()
    69→    reader.onload = () => resolve(String(reader.result))
    70→    reader.onerror = () => reject(reader.error ?? new Error('File read failed'))
    71→    reader.readAsDataURL(file)
    72→  })
    73→}
    74→
    75→export async function defaultImageUpload(
    76→  file: File,
    77→): Promise<ImageUploadResult> {
    78→  return {
    79→    src: await readAsDataUrl(file),
    80→    altText: file.name,
    81→  }
    82→}
    83→
    84→interface ImageUploadPluginProps {
    85→  onUpload: ImageUploadFn
    86→}
    87→
    88→export function ImageUploadPlugin({ onUpload }: ImageUploadPluginProps) {
    89→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    90→  const uploadRef = useRef(onUpload)
    91→  uploadRef.current = onUpload
    92→  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)
    93→  const toastTimerRef = useRef<number | null>(null)
    94→
    95→  const [dialogOpen, setDialogOpen] = useState(false)
    96→  const [tab, setTab] = useState<'upload' | 'url'>('upload')
    97→  const [rootDragActive, setRootDragActive] = useState(false)
    98→  const [dialogDragActive, setDialogDragActive] = useState(false)
    99→  const [pendingUploads, setPendingUploads] = useState(0)
   100→  const [dialogUploading, setDialogUploading] = useState(false)
   101→  const [toast, setToast] = useState<null | {
   102→    kind: 'success' | 'error'
   103→    message: string
   104→  }>(null)
   105→
   106→  const [urlInput, setUrlInput] = useState('')
   107→  const [urlPreview, setUrlPreview] = useState<string | null>(null)
   108→  const [urlMeta, setUrlMeta] = useState<{
   109→    width: number
   110→    height: number
   111→  } | null>(null)
   112→  const [urlLoading, setUrlLoading] = useState(false)
   113→  const [urlError, setUrlError] = useState<string | null>(null)
   114→
   115→  const tabItems = useMemo(
   116→    () => [
   117→      { value: 'upload' as const, label: 'Upload' },
   118→      { value: 'url' as const, label: 'URL' },
   119→    ],
   120→    [],
   121→  )
   122→
   123→  const pushToast = useCallback(
   124→    (kind: 'success' | 'error', message: string) => {
   125→      setToast({ kind, message })
   126→      if (toastTimerRef.current) {
   127→        window.clearTimeout(toastTimerRef.current)
   128→      }
   129→      toastTimerRef.current = window.setTimeout(() => setToast(null), 2200)
   130→    },
   131→    [],
   132→  )
   133→
   134→  const insertByUpload = useCallback(
   135→    async (file: File, options?: { closeDialog?: boolean }) => {
   136→      if (!isImageFile(file)) return false
   137→
   138→      const closeDialog = Boolean(options?.closeDialog)
   139→
   140→      setPendingUploads((value) => value + 1)
   141→      if (closeDialog) setDialogUploading(true)
   142→
   143→      try {
   144→        const [result, meta] = await Promise.all([
   145→          uploadRef.current(file),
   146→          computeImageMeta(file),
   147→        ])
   148→
   149→        editor.update(() => {
   150→          const node = $createImageNode({
   151→            src: result.src,
   152→            altText: result.altText ?? file.name,
   153→            width: result.width ?? meta.width,
   154→            height: result.height ?? meta.height,
   155→            thumbhash: result.thumbhash ?? meta.thumbhash,
   156→          })
   157→          $insertNodes([node])
   158→        })
   159→
   160→        if (closeDialog) {
   161→          setDialogOpen(false)
   162→          setUrlInput('')
   163→          setUrlPreview(null)
   164→          setUrlMeta(null)
   165→          setUrlError(null)
   166→        }
   167→        pushToast('success', 'Image uploaded')
   168→        return true
   169→      } catch (err: unknown) {
   170→        console.error('[ImageUploadPlugin]', err)
   171→        pushToast('error', 'Image upload failed')
   172→        return false
   173→      } finally {
   174→        setPendingUploads((value) => Math.max(value - 1, 0))
   175→        setDialogUploading(false)
   176→      }
   177→    },
   178→    [editor, pushToast],
   179→  )
   180→
   181→  const handleFiles = useCallback(
   182→    (files: File[]): boolean => {
   183→      const images = files.filter(isImageFile)
   184→      if (images.length === 0) return false
   185→
   186→      for (const file of images) {
   187→        void insertByUpload(file)
   188→      }
   189→      return true
   190→    },
   191→    [insertByUpload],
   192→  )
   193→
   194→  useEffect(() => {
   195→    const unregisterDragDrop = editor.registerCommand(
   196→      DRAG_DROP_PASTE,
   197→      (files: File[]) => handleFiles(files),
   198→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_HIGH,
   199→    )
   200→
   201→    const unregisterPaste = editor.registerCommand(
   202→      PASTE_COMMAND,
   203→      (event: ClipboardEvent | InputEvent | KeyboardEvent) => {
   204→        const clipboardData =
   205→          'clipboardData' in event
   206→            ? (event as ClipboardEvent).clipboardData
   207→            : null
   208→        if (!clipboardData) return false
   209→
   210→        const files = Array.from(clipboardData.files)
   211→        if (files.some(isImageFile)) {
   212→          return handleFiles(files)
   213→        }
   214→        return false
   215→      },
   216→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_HIGH,
   217→    )
   218→
   219→    const unregisterOpenDialog = editor.registerCommand(
   220→      OPEN_IMAGE_UPLOAD_DIALOG_COMMAND,
   221→      () => {
   222→        setDialogOpen(true)
   223→        return true
   224→      },
   225→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR,
   226→    )
   227→
   228→    const rootElement = editor.getRootElement()
   229→    const wrapper = rootElement?.parentElement ?? null
   230→    if (!wrapper) {
   231→      return () => {
   232→        unregisterDragDrop()
   233→        unregisterPaste()
   234→        unregisterOpenDialog()
   235→      }
   236→    }
   237→
   238→    let dragCounter = 0
   239→
   240→    const setWrapperDragging = (next: boolean) => {
   241→      setRootDragActive(next)
   242→      wrapper.classList.toggle(css.draggingWrapperClass, next)
   243→    }
   244→
   245→    const onDragEnter = (event: DragEvent) => {
   246→      if (!hasImageData(event.dataTransfer)) return
   247→      dragCounter += 1
   248→      setWrapperDragging(true)
   249→    }
   250→
   251→    const onDragOver = (event: DragEvent) => {
   252→      if (!hasImageData(event.dataTransfer)) return
   253→      event.preventDefault()
   254→    }
   255→
   256→    const onDragLeave = () => {
   257→      dragCounter = Math.max(dragCounter - 1, 0)
   258→      if (dragCounter === 0) {
   259→        setWrapperDragging(false)
   260→      }
   261→    }
   262→
   263→    const onDrop = () => {
   264→      dragCounter = 0
   265→      setWrapperDragging(false)
   266→    }
   267→
   268→    rootElement?.addEventListener('dragenter', onDragEnter)
   269→    rootElement?.addEventListener('dragover', onDragOver)
   270→    rootElement?.addEventListener('dragleave', onDragLeave)
   271→    rootElement?.addEventListener('drop', onDrop)
   272→
   273→    return () => {
   274→      if (toastTimerRef.current) {
   275→        window.clearTimeout(toastTimerRef.current)
   276→      }
   277→      unregisterDragDrop()
   278→      unregisterPaste()
   279→      unregisterOpenDialog()
   280→      setWrapperDragging(false)
   281→      rootElement?.removeEventListener('dragenter', onDragEnter)
   282→      rootElement?.removeEventListener('dragover', onDragOver)
   283→      rootElement?.removeEventListener('dragleave', onDragLeave)
   284→      rootElement?.removeEventListener('drop', onDrop)
   285→    }
   286→  }, [editor, handleFiles])
   287→
   288→  const resetUrlState = useCallback(() => {
   289→    setUrlInput('')
   290→    setUrlPreview(null)
   291→    setUrlMeta(null)
   292→    setUrlError(null)
   293→    setUrlLoading(false)
   294→  }, [])
   295→
   296→  const handleDialogFile = useCallback(
   297→    async (file: File | null) => {
   298→      if (!file) return
   299→      await insertByUpload(file, { closeDialog: true })
   300→    },
   301→    [insertByUpload],
   302→  )
   303→
   304→  const handleUrlPreview = useCallback(async () => {
   305→    const nextUrl = urlInput.trim()
   306→    if (!nextUrl) return
   307→    if (!isSafeImageUrl(nextUrl)) {
   308→      setUrlError('Unsupported URL scheme')
   309→      return
   310→    }
   311→
   312→    setUrlLoading(true)
   313→    setUrlError(null)
   314→    try {
   315→      const meta = await loadImageByUrl(nextUrl)
   316→      setUrlMeta(meta)
   317→      setUrlPreview(nextUrl)
   318→    } catch {
   319→      setUrlPreview(null)
   320→      setUrlMeta(null)
   321→      setUrlError('Could not load this image URL')
   322→    } finally {
   323→      setUrlLoading(false)
   324→    }
   325→  }, [urlInput])
   326→
   327→  const handleInsertByUrl = useCallback(() => {
   328→    if (!urlPreview || !isSafeImageUrl(urlPreview)) return
   329→
   330→    editor.update(() => {
   331→      const node = $createImageNode({
   332→        src: urlPreview,
   333→        altText: '',
   334→        width: urlMeta?.width,
   335→        height: urlMeta?.height,
   336→      })
   337→      $insertNodes([node])
   338→    })
   339→    pushToast('success', 'Image inserted')
   340→    setDialogOpen(false)
   341→    resetUrlState()
   342→  }, [editor, pushToast, resetUrlState, urlMeta, urlPreview])
   343→
   344→  const helperMessage =
   345→    pendingUploads > 0
   346→      ? `Uploading ${pendingUploads} image${pendingUploads > 1 ? 's' : ''}...`
   347→      : rootDragActive
   348→        ? 'Drop image files to upload'
   349→        : null
   350→
   351→  return (
   352→    <>
   353→      {(helperMessage || toast) && (
   354→        <div className={css.toastStack}>
   355→          {helperMessage && (
   356→            <div className={`${css.toast} ${css.toastVariant.info}`}>
   357→              <span className={css.spinner} />
   358→              {helperMessage}
   359→            </div>
   360→          )}
   361→          {toast && (
   362→            <div className={`${css.toast} ${css.toastVariant[toast.kind]}`}>
   363→              {toast.kind === 'success' ? (
   364→                <Check size={12} />
   365→              ) : (
   366→                <Info size={12} />
   367→              )}
   368→              {toast.message}
   369→            </div>
   370→          )}
   371→        </div>
   372→      )}
   373→
   374→      <Dialog
   375→        open={dialogOpen}
   376→        onOpenChange={(nextOpen) => {
   377→          if (!nextOpen && dialogUploading) return
   378→          setDialogOpen(nextOpen)
   379→          if (!nextOpen) {
   380→            resetUrlState()
   381→            setDialogUploading(false)
   382→            setDialogDragActive(false)
   383→          }
   384→        }}
   385→      >
   386→        <DialogPopup
   387→          className={css.dialogPopup}
   388→          showCloseButton={!dialogUploading}
   389→        >
   390→          <div className={css.dialogHeader}>
   391→            <DialogTitle className={css.dialogTitle}>Insert image</DialogTitle>
   392→          </div>
   393→
   394→          <div className={css.dialogBody}>
   395→            <div className={css.tabWrap}>
   396→              <SegmentedControl
   397→                items={tabItems}
   398→                value={tab}
   399→                onChange={setTab}
   400→                fullWidth
   401→              />
   402→            </div>
   403→
   404→            {tab === 'upload' ? (
   405→              <div
   406→                role="button"
   407→                tabIndex={0}
   408→                className={`${css.uploadDropzone} ${css.uploadDropzoneState[dialogUploading ? 'busy' : dialogDragActive ? 'active' : 'idle']}`}
   409→                onClick={() => {
   410→                  if (!dialogUploading) fileInputRef.current?.click()
   411→                }}
   412→                onKeyDown={(event) => {
   413→                  if (event.key !== 'Enter' && event.key !== ' ') return
   414→                  event.preventDefault()
   415→                  if (!dialogUploading) fileInputRef.current?.click()
   416→                }}
   417→                onDragEnter={(event) => {
   418→                  if (hasImageData(event.dataTransfer)) {
   419→                    event.preventDefault()
   420→                    setDialogDragActive(true)
   421→                  }
   422→                }}
   423→                onDragOver={(event) => {
   424→                  if (hasImageData(event.dataTransfer)) {
   425→                    event.preventDefault()
   426→                  }
   427→                }}
   428→                onDragLeave={() => setDialogDragActive(false)}
   429→                onDrop={(event) => {
   430→                  event.preventDefault()
   431→                  setDialogDragActive(false)
   432→                  const file = Array.from(event.dataTransfer.files).find(
   433→                    isImageFile,
   434→                  )
   435→                  void handleDialogFile(file ?? null)
   436→                }}
   437→              >
   438→                <input
   439→                  ref={fileInputRef}
   440→                  className={css.hiddenInput}
   441→                  type="file"
   442→                  accept="image/*"
   443→                  onChange={(event) => {
   444→                    const file = event.currentTarget.files?.[0] ?? null
   445→                    void handleDialogFile(file)
   446→                    event.currentTarget.value = ''
   447→                  }}
   448→                />
   449→
   450→                {dialogUploading ? (
   451→                  <div className={css.uploadBusyWrap}>
   452→                    <div className={css.uploadProgress}>
   453→                      <span className={css.spinner} />
   454→                      Uploading image...
   455→                    </div>
   456→                  </div>
   457→                ) : (
   458→                  <>
   459→                    <span className={css.uploadDropIcon}>
   460→                      <Upload size={18} />
   461→                    </span>
   462→                    <span className={css.uploadDropTitle}>
   463→                      Click to upload or drag and drop
   464→                    </span>
   465→                    <span className={css.uploadDropDesc}>
   466→                      PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP
   467→                    </span>
   468→                  </>
   469→                )}
   470→              </div>
   471→            ) : (
   472→              <>
   473→                <div className={css.urlInputRow}>
   474→                  <input
   475→                    className={css.textInput}
   476→                    type="url"
   477→                    placeholder="https://example.com/image.jpg"
   478→                    value={urlInput}
   479→                    onChange={(event) => {
   480→                      setUrlInput(event.target.value)
   481→                      setUrlError(null)
   482→                      setUrlPreview(null)
   483→                      setUrlMeta(null)
   484→                    }}
   485→                    onKeyDown={(event) => {
   486→                      if (event.key === 'Enter') {
   487→                        event.preventDefault()
   488→                        if (urlPreview) {
   489→                          handleInsertByUrl()
   490→                        } else {
   491→                          void handleUrlPreview()
   492→                        }
   493→                      }
   494→                    }}
   495→                  />
   496→                  <button
   497→                    type="button"
   498→                    className={css.secondaryButton}
   499→                    disabled={urlLoading || !urlInput.trim()}
   500→                    onClick={() => void handleUrlPreview()}
   501→                  >
   502→                    {urlLoading ? 'Loading' : 'Preview'}
   503→                  </button>
   504→                  <button
   505→                    type="button"
   506→                    className={css.actionButton}
   507→                    disabled={!urlPreview}
   508→                    onClick={handleInsertByUrl}
   509→                  >
   510→                    Insert
   511→                  </button>
   512→                </div>
   513→
   514→                {urlError && (
   515→                  <span
   516→                    className={`${css.helperText} ${css.toastVariant.error}`}
   517→                  >
   518→                    <Info size={12} />
   519→                    {urlError}
   520→                  </span>
   521→                )}
   522→
   523→                {urlPreview && (
   524→                  <div className={css.urlPreview}>
   525→                    <img
   526→                      className={css.urlPreviewImage}
   527→                      src={urlPreview}
   528→                      alt="Preview"
   529→                    />
   530→                  </div>
   531→                )}
   532→              </>
   533→            )}
   534→          </div>
   535→
   536→          <div className={css.dialogFooter}>
   537→            <span className={css.helperText}>
   538→              <Link2 size={12} />
   539→              You can also paste images or drag files directly into the editor.
   540→            </span>
   541→            <div className={css.dialogFooterActions}>
   542→              <button
   543→                type="button"
   544→                className={css.secondaryButton}
   545→                onClick={() => setDialogOpen(false)}
   546→                disabled={dialogUploading}
   547→              >
   548→                Close
   549→              </button>
   550→            </div>
   551→          </div>
   552→        </DialogPopup>
   553→      </Dialog>
   554→    </>
   555→  )
   556→}
   557→

    40→
    41→export function RichEditor({

    43→  onChange,
    44→  variant = 'article',

    46→  placeholder = 'Write something...',
    47→  onSubmit,
    48→  autoFocus = false,
    49→  className,

    75→
    76→  return (

    81→          mode="editor"

    83→        >

    88→                  className={clsx('rich-editor', variantClass, className)}
    89→                  style={style}

    91→                  suppressHydrationWarning

   104→                  <LinkPlugin />
   105→                  <TabIndentationPlugin />
   106→                  <TablePlugin />

     1→import { CHECK_LIST, CODE, QUOTE, TRANSFORMERS } from '@lexical/markdown'

## CodeBlock Node Architecture in @haklex/rich-editor

### 1. **CodeBlockNode (Base/Static Node)**

**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/nodes/CodeBlockNode.ts`

**Purpose**: Read-only rendering of code blocks with syntax highlighting.

**Class Structure**:
- Extends `DecoratorNode<ReactElement>`
- Stores two private properties: `__code` (string) and `__language` (string)
- Type identifier: `'code-block'`

**Constructor & Creation**:
```typescript
new CodeBlockNode(code: string, language: string, key?: NodeKey)
$createCodeBlockNode(code: string, language: string): CodeBlockNode
$isCodeBlockNode(node): boolean
```

**Key Methods**:
- `getCode()` / `setCode(code)` — getter/setter for code content
- `getLanguage()` / `setLanguage(language)` — getter/setter for language identifier
- `importJSON(serialized)` — deserializes from JSON with `code` and `language` fields
- `exportJSON()` — serializes with `code`, `language`, `type: 'code-block'`, and `version: 1`
- `decorate()` — returns `RendererWrapper` (via `createRendererDecoration`) wrapping `CodeBlockRenderer` with code + language props
- `createDOM()` — creates `<div class="rich-code-block-wrapper">`
- `updateDOM()` — returns `false` (no DOM updates; all changes go through React re-render)
- `isInline()` → `false`
- `isKeyboardSelectable()` → `true`

**Slash Menu Integration**:
- Static property `slashMenuItems` provides UI for inserting via `/code` command
- Icon: `lucide-react`'s `Code` icon
- Section: `'MEDIA'`
- Creates node with empty code and `'text'` language by default

---

### 2. **CodeBlockEditNode (Edit/Interactive Variant)**

**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/nodes/CodeBlockEditNode.ts`

**Purpose**: Full editing capabilities with interactive UI for changing code, language, and navigation.

**Inheritance**:
```typescript
class CodeBlockEditNode extends CodeBlockNode
```
- Reuses all getters, setters, and serialization from base
- Overrides only `clone()`, `importJSON()`, and `decorate()` for editor context

**Key Differences from Base**:
1. **decorate()** — returns `CodeBlockEditDecorator` directly instead of `RendererWrapper`
   - Passes `nodeKey`, `code`, `language` as props
   - No custom renderer injection point (edit path is fixed)

2. **importJSON()** — explicitly creates `CodeBlockEditNode` instance (not generic factory)

3. **Slash Menu** — maps base menu items but modifies `onSelect` to insert `CodeBlockEditNode` instead of base node

**Creation**:
```typescript
$createCodeBlockEditNode(code: string, language: string): CodeBlockEditNode
new CodeBlockEditNode(code, language)
```

---

### 3. **CodeBlockRenderer (Static Display Component)**

**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/CodeBlockRenderer.tsx`

**Props**:
```typescript
interface CodeBlockRendererProps {
  code: string
  language: string
  showLineNumbers?: boolean         // Defaults to true unless variant='comment'
  editable?: boolean                // Read-only mode flag
  selected?: boolean                // Selection highlight (edit only)
  cursorPlacement?: 'start' | 'end' // Nested editor focus point (edit only)
  onCodeChange?: (code: string) => void
  onLanguageChange?: (language: string) => void
  onDelete?: () => void
  onExitBlock?: (direction: 'before' | 'after') => void
}
```

**Rendering Logic**:
1. **Syntax Highlighting**: Uses Shiki (lazy-loaded via `loadCodeToHtml()`)
   - Theme: `'github-dark'` or `'github-light'` based on `ColorSchemeContext`
   - Output: `<div dangerouslySetInnerHTML>` with highlighted HTML

2. **Fallback**: If Shiki unavailable, renders raw `<pre><code>` with line splits

3. **Header**: Displays language tag + "Copy" button (copies to clipboard)

4. **Line Numbers**: CSS class `'rich-code-block-numbered'` applied when `showLineNumbers=true`

**Styling Classes**:
- `.rich-code-block` — base wrapper
- `.rich-code-block-numbered` — when line numbers shown
- `.rich-code-block-header` — language + copy button container
- `.rich-code-block-lang` — language label
- `.rich-code-block-copy` — copy button

---

### 4. **CodeBlockEditDecorator (Interactive Wrapper)**

**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/CodeBlockEditDecorator.tsx`

**Purpose**: Wraps `CodeBlockRenderer` with full editing logic and state management.

**Props**:
```typescript
interface CodeBlockEditDecoratorProps {
  nodeKey: string
  code: string
  language: string
}
```

**State Management**:
- `isSelected` — Lexical node selection state (via `useLexicalNodeSelection`)
- `cursorPlacement` — `'start' | 'end'` for nested editor focus (consumed from intent map on selection)
- `editable` — editor mode flag

**Handlers** (passed to `CodeBlockRenderer` only when editable):

1. **handleCodeChange(newCode)** — updates node via `node.setCode()`
2. **handleLanguageChange(newLanguage)** — updates node via `node.setLanguage()`
3. **handleDelete()** — removes node and navigates to previous/next sibling or creates new paragraph
   - Sets cursor intent on adjacent code blocks for smooth navigation
4. **handleExitBlock(direction)** — exits block (keyboard Ctrl+Up/Down)
   - `'before'` → selects previous sibling
   - `'after'` → selects next sibling or creates paragraph

**Navigation Pattern**: Uses `codeBlockSelectionIntent` map to preserve cursor placement across decorator re-renders (prevents focus loss on code edits).

---

### 5. **Markdown Transformer**

**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/transformers/code-block.ts`

**Type**: `MultilineElementTransformer` (from `@lexical/markdown`)

**Pattern**:
```regex
Start: /^[ \t]*```([\w-]+)?/
End:   /[ \t]*```$/  (optional)
```

**Processing**:
1. Captures optional language identifier after opening `` ``` ``
2. Collects all lines between start/end markers
3. Trims leading/trailing blank lines
4. Creates node via `findCodeBlockKlass()` — automatically uses `CodeBlockEditNode` from `getResolvedEditNodes()` in editor context

**Key Feature**: Dynamic node class resolution
- Searches for `getType() === 'code-block'` in resolved edit nodes
- Falls back to `CodeBlockNode` if not found
- Allows plugins/extensions to override node type

---

### 6. **MarkdownShortcutsPlugin**

**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/plugins/MarkdownShortcutsPlugin.tsx`

```typescript
function MarkdownShortcutsPlugin() {
  return <LexicalMarkdownShortcutPlugin transformers={ALL_TRANSFORMERS} />
}
```

**Integration**:
- Wraps Lexical's built-in `MarkdownShortcutPlugin`
- Passes `ALL_TRANSFORMERS` array which includes `CODE_BLOCK_MULTILINE_TRANSFORMER`
- Code block transformer is in block transformers group (not inline)

**Execution Order** (from `src/transformers/index.ts`):
- Inline transformers first (spoiler, mention, footnote, etc.)
- Block transformers second (footnote section, container, alert, **code block**, etc.)
- Custom rich-block transformers follow
- Lexical built-in transformers (quote, lists, etc.) last

---

### 7. **Node Registration**

**Static Mode** (`src/config.ts`):
```typescript
export const customNodes = [
  ...,
  CodeBlockNode,  // Base node for RichRenderer
  ...,
]
```

**Edit Mode** (`src/config-edit.ts`):
```typescript
export const customEditNodes = [
  ...,
  CodeBlockEditNode,  // Edit node for RichEditor
  ...,
]
```

**Resolution**:
- `RichRenderer` uses `CodeBlockNode` → only `CodeBlockRenderer` imported, lightweight
- `RichEditor` uses `CodeBlockEditNode` → full `CodeBlockEditDecorator` imported with all edit deps

**Node Registry Pattern** (`src/node-registry.ts`):
- `setResolvedEditNodes()` — allows runtime override of edit node set
- `getResolvedEditNodes()` — returns resolved edit nodes (defaults to `allEditNodes`)
- Used by code-block transformer to find correct node class at parse time

---

### 8. **RendererWrapper (Custom Renderer Injection)**

**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/RendererWrapper.tsx`

**Static Path**:
```typescript
// In CodeBlockNode.decorate()
createRendererDecoration('CodeBlock', CodeBlockRenderer, {
  code: this.__code,
  language: this.__language,
})
```

**Effect**: Allows injecting custom `CodeBlockRenderer` via `RendererConfig` context without touching node code.

**Edit Path**:
- `CodeBlockEditDecorator` directly wraps `CodeBlockRenderer` with `RendererWrapper`
- No custom renderer injection at decorator level (decorator always uses default renderer)
- Props include edit callbacks (`onCodeChange`, `onLanguageChange`, `onDelete`, `onExitBlock`)

---

## Summary: Paste Detection Plugin Integration Points

For a **paste detection plugin**, the CodeBlock architecture reveals:

1. **Node Creation**: Use `$createCodeBlockNode(code, language)` or intercept at `CodeBlockEditNode` level
2. **Paste Trigger**: Hook into editor's `paste` command or Lexical's `onUpdate` callback
3. **Language Detection**: After paste, extract language from fence markers or use fallback
4. **Node Mutation**: Call `node.setCode()` and `node.setLanguage()` within `editor.update()` transaction
5. **Transformer Integration**: CODE_BLOCK_MULTILINE_TRANSFORMER already handles markdown fence → node conversion; paste plugin could supplement with paste event detection
6. **Cursor Intent**: Use `setCodeBlockCursorIntent(nodeKey, placement)` to preserve focus after programmatic edits

```text
     1→import type { MultilineElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
     2→import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
     3→import { $createNodeSelection, $setSelection } from 'lexical'
     4→
     5→import { getResolvedEditNodes } from '../node-registry'
     6→import { CodeBlockNode } from '../nodes/CodeBlockNode'
     7→
     8→function findCodeBlockKlass(
     9→  nodes: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>,
    10→): Klass<LexicalNode> {
    11→  return nodes.find((n: any) => n.getType?.() === 'code-block') || CodeBlockNode
    12→}
    13→
    14→export const CODE_BLOCK_MULTILINE_TRANSFORMER: MultilineElementTransformer = {
    15→  dependencies: [],
    16→  regExpEnd: {
    17→    optional: true,
    18→    regExp: /[ \t]*```$/,
    19→  },
    20→  regExpStart: /^[ \t]*```([\w-]+)?/,
    21→  replace: (rootNode, _children, startMatch, _endMatch, linesInBetween) => {
    22→    const lang = startMatch[1] || ''
    23→    let code = ''
    24→
    25→    if (linesInBetween) {
    26→      const lines = [...linesInBetween]
    27→      while (lines.length > 0 && !lines[0].length) lines.shift()
    28→      while (lines.length > 0 && !lines.at(-1)?.length) lines.pop()
    29→      code = lines.join('\n')
    30→    }
    31→
    32→    const Klass = findCodeBlockKlass(getResolvedEditNodes())
    33→    const node = new (Klass as any)(code, lang)
    34→    rootNode.replace(node)
    35→
    36→    const selection = $createNodeSelection()
    37→    selection.add(node.getKey())
    38→    $setSelection(selection)
    39→  },
    40→  type: 'multiline-element',
    41→}
    42→
```
</details></tool-use>

    88→    }

    93→  }
    94→
    95→  setCode(code: string): void {

    97→    writable.__code = code
    98→  }
    99→
   100→  getLanguage(): string {
   101→    return this.__language
   102→  }
   103→
   104→  setLanguage(language: string): void {

   106→    writable.__language = language
   107→  }
   108→

   110→    return createRendererDecoration('CodeBlock', CodeBlockRenderer, {

   113→    })

   115→}
   116→
   117→export function $createCodeBlockNode(
   118→  code: string,
   119→  language: string,
   120→): CodeBlockNode {

   122→}
   123→
   124→export function $isCodeBlockNode(

     1→import type { MultilineElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
     2→import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
     3→import { $createNodeSelection, $setSelection } from 'lexical'
     4→
     5→import { getResolvedEditNodes } from '../node-registry'
     6→import { CodeBlockNode } from '../nodes/CodeBlockNode'
     7→
     8→function findCodeBlockKlass(
     9→  nodes: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>,
    10→): Klass<LexicalNode> {
    11→  return nodes.find((n: any) => n.getType?.() === 'code-block') || CodeBlockNode
    12→}
    13→
    14→export const CODE_BLOCK_MULTILINE_TRANSFORMER: MultilineElementTransformer = {
    15→  dependencies: [],
    16→  regExpEnd: {
    17→    optional: true,
    18→    regExp: /[ \t]*```$/,
    19→  },
    20→  regExpStart: /^[ \t]*```([\w-]+)?/,
    21→  replace: (rootNode, _children, startMatch, _endMatch, linesInBetween) => {
    22→    const lang = startMatch[1] || ''
    23→    let code = ''
    24→
    25→    if (linesInBetween) {
    26→      const lines = [...linesInBetween]
    27→      while (lines.length > 0 && !lines[0].length) lines.shift()
    28→      while (lines.length > 0 && !lines.at(-1)?.length) lines.pop()
    29→      code = lines.join('\n')
    30→    }
    31→
    32→    const Klass = findCodeBlockKlass(getResolvedEditNodes())
    33→    const node = new (Klass as any)(code, lang)
    34→    rootNode.replace(node)
    35→
    36→    const selection = $createNodeSelection()
    37→    selection.add(node.getKey())
    38→    $setSelection(selection)
    39→  },
    40→  type: 'multiline-element',
    41→}
    42→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→/**
     2→ * Headless Markdown transformers — export-only (Lexical → Markdown).
     3→ * Import stubs are no-ops; used only for $convertToMarkdownString.
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import {
     7→  $convertToMarkdownString,
     8→  CHECK_LIST,
     9→  type ElementTransformer,
    10→  type TextFormatTransformer,
    11→  type TextMatchTransformer,
    12→  TRANSFORMERS,
    13→} from '@lexical/markdown'
    14→import { $isTableCellNode, $isTableNode, $isTableRowNode } from '@lexical/table'
    15→
    16→// ── Helpers ──
    17→
    18→const NEVER = /a^/
    19→const NOOP = () => {}
    20→
    21→function qA(v: string): string {
    22→  return v.replaceAll('"', '\\"')
    23→}
    24→
    25→function escHtml(v: string): string {
    26→  return v
    27→    .replaceAll('&', '&amp;')
    28→    .replaceAll('<', '&lt;')
    29→    .replaceAll('>', '&gt;')
    30→}
    31→
    32→function escCell(v: string): string {
    33→  return v.replaceAll('|', '\\|').replaceAll('\n', '<br/>')
    34→}
    35→
    36→function fence(content: string): string {
    37→  const m = content.match(/`+/g)
    38→  const max = m?.reduce((a, r) => Math.max(a, r.length), 0) ?? 0
    39→  return '`'.repeat(Math.max(3, max + 1))
    40→}
    41→
    42→function walkText(node: Record<string, unknown>): string {
    43→  const children = node.children as Record<string, unknown>[] | undefined
    44→  if (!children) return (node.text as string) ?? ''
    45→  return children.map(walkText).join('\n')
    46→}
    47→
    48→function stateText(state: unknown): string {
    49→  if (!state || typeof state !== 'object') return ''
    50→  const root = (state as Record<string, unknown>).root as
    51→    | Record<string, unknown>
    52→    | undefined
    53→  return root ? walkText(root) : ''
    54→}
    55→
    56→// ── TextMatch (inline) ──
    57→
    58→export const SPOILER_TRANSFORMER: TextMatchTransformer = {
    59→  dependencies: [],
    60→  export: (node) =>
    61→    node.getType() === 'spoiler' ? `||${node.getTextContent()}||` : null,
    62→  importRegExp: /\|\|(.+?)\|\|/,
    63→  regExp: /\|\|(.+?)\|\|$/,
    64→  replace: NOOP as any,
    65→  trigger: '|',
    66→  type: 'text-match',
    67→}
    68→
    69→export const MENTION_TRANSFORMER: TextMatchTransformer = {
    70→  dependencies: [],
    71→  export: (node) => {
    72→    if (node.getType() !== 'mention') return null
    73→    const j = node.exportJSON() as any
    74→    const base = `{${j.platform}@${j.handle}}`
    75→    return j.displayName ? `[${j.displayName}]${base}` : base
    76→  },
    77→  importRegExp: /(?:\[([^\]]+)\])?\{(\w+)@(\w[\w.-]*)\}/,
    78→  regExp: /(?:\[([^\]]+)\])?\{(\w+)@(\w[\w.-]*)\}$/,
    79→  replace: NOOP as any,
    80→  trigger: '}',
    81→  type: 'text-match',
    82→}
    83→
    84→export const FOOTNOTE_TRANSFORMER: TextMatchTransformer = {
    85→  dependencies: [],
    86→  export: (node) =>
    87→    node.getType() === 'footnote'
    88→      ? `[^${(node as any).__identifier ?? ''}]`
    89→      : null,
    90→  importRegExp: /\[\^(\w+)\]/,
    91→  regExp: /\[\^(\w+)\]$/,
    92→  replace: NOOP as any,
    93→  trigger: ']',
    94→  type: 'text-match',
    95→}
    96→
    97→export const KATEX_INLINE_TRANSFORMER: TextMatchTransformer = {
    98→  dependencies: [],
    99→  export: (node) =>
   100→    node.getType() === 'katex-inline'
   101→      ? `$${(node as any).__equation ?? ''}$`
   102→      : null,
   103→  importRegExp: /\$([^$\n]+)\$/,
   104→  regExp: /\$([^$\n]+)\$$/,
   105→  replace: NOOP as any,
   106→  trigger: '$',
   107→  type: 'text-match',
   108→}
   109→
   110→export const RUBY_TRANSFORMER: TextMatchTransformer = {
   111→  dependencies: [],
   112→  export: (node) => {
   113→    if (node.getType() !== 'ruby') return null
   114→    const base = escHtml(node.getTextContent())
   115→    const reading = escHtml((node as any).__reading ?? '')
   116→    if (!reading) return base
   117→    return `<ruby>${base}<rt>${reading}</rt></ruby>`
   118→  },
   119→  importRegExp:
   120→    /<ruby>\s*([\s\S]*?)\s*<rt>\s*([\s\S]*?)\s*<\/rt>\s*(?:<rp>[\s\S]*?<\/rp>\s*)*<\/ruby>/i,
   121→  regExp:
   122→    /<ruby>\s*([\s\S]*?)\s*<rt>\s*([\s\S]*?)\s*<\/rt>\s*(?:<rp>[\s\S]*?<\/rp>\s*)*<\/ruby>$/i,
   123→  replace: NOOP as any,
   124→  trigger: '>',
   125→  type: 'text-match',
   126→}
   127→
   128→// ── TextFormat ──
   129→
   130→export const INSERT_TRANSFORMER: TextFormatTransformer = {
   131→  format: ['underline'],
   132→  tag: '++',
   133→  type: 'text-format',
   134→}
   135→
   136→export const SUPERSCRIPT_TRANSFORMER: TextFormatTransformer = {
   137→  format: ['superscript'],
   138→  tag: '^',
   139→  type: 'text-format',
   140→}
   141→
   142→export const SUBSCRIPT_TRANSFORMER: TextFormatTransformer = {
   143→  format: ['subscript'],
   144→  tag: '~',
   145→  type: 'text-format',
   146→}
   147→
   148→// ── Element (block) ──
   149→
   150→export const FOOTNOTE_SECTION_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   151→  dependencies: [],
   152→  export: (node) => {
   153→    if (node.getType() !== 'footnote-section') return null
   154→    const defs = (node as any).__definitions ?? {}
   155→    return Object.entries(defs)
   156→      .map(([id, content]) => `[^${id}]: ${content}`)
   157→      .join('\n')
   158→  },
   159→  regExp: NEVER,
   160→  replace: NOOP,
   161→  type: 'element',
   162→}
   163→
   164→export const CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   165→  dependencies: [],
   166→  export: (node) => {
   167→    const t = node.getType()
   168→    if (t === 'banner') {
   169→      const type = (node as any).__bannerType ?? 'note'
   170→      return `::: ${type}\n${node.getTextContent()}\n:::`
   171→    }
   172→    if (t === 'details') {
   173→      const summary = (node as any).__summary ?? ''
   174→      return `::: details{summary="${qA(summary)}"}\n${node.getTextContent()}\n:::`
   175→    }
   176→    return null
   177→  },
   178→  regExp: NEVER,
   179→  replace: NOOP,
   180→  type: 'element',
   181→}
   182→
   183→const ALERT_KEY: Record<string, string> = {
   184→  note: 'NOTE',
   185→  tip: 'TIP',
   186→  important: 'IMPORTANT',
   187→  warning: 'WARNING',
   188→  caution: 'CAUTION',
   189→}
   190→
   191→export const GIT_ALERT_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   192→  dependencies: [],
   193→  export: (node) => {
   194→    if (node.getType() !== 'alert-quote') return null
   195→    const key = ALERT_KEY[(node as any).__alertType ?? 'note'] ?? 'NOTE'
   196→    const lines = node.getTextContent().split('\n')
   197→    return [`> [!${key}]`, ...lines.map((l) => `> ${l}`)].join('\n')
   198→  },
   199→  regExp: NEVER,
   200→  replace: NOOP,
   201→  type: 'element',
   202→}
   203→
   204→export const KATEX_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: TextMatchTransformer = {
   205→  dependencies: [],
   206→  export: (node) =>
   207→    node.getType() === 'katex-block'
   208→      ? `$$${(node as any).__equation ?? ''}$$`
   209→      : null,
   210→  importRegExp: /\$\$([^$]+)\$\$/,
   211→  regExp: /\$\$([^$]+)\$\$$/,
   212→  replace: NOOP as any,
   213→  trigger: '$',
   214→  type: 'text-match',
   215→}
   216→
   217→export const IMAGE_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   218→  dependencies: [],
   219→  export: (node) => {
   220→    if (node.getType() !== 'image') return null
   221→    const j = node.exportJSON() as any
   222→    const title = j.caption ? ` "${qA(j.caption)}"` : ''
   223→    return `![${j.altText || ''}](${j.src}${title})`
   224→  },
   225→  regExp: NEVER,
   226→  replace: NOOP,
   227→  type: 'element',
   228→}
   229→
   230→export const VIDEO_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   231→  dependencies: [],
   232→  export: (node) => {
   233→    if (node.getType() !== 'video') return null
   234→    const j = node.exportJSON() as any
   235→    const attrs = [`src="${qA(j.src)}"`]
   236→    if (j.poster) attrs.push(`poster="${qA(j.poster)}"`)
   237→    if (j.width) attrs.push(`width=${j.width}`)
   238→    if (j.height) attrs.push(`height=${j.height}`)
   239→    return `<video ${attrs.join(' ')} controls></video>`
   240→  },
   241→  regExp: NEVER,
   242→  replace: NOOP,
   243→  type: 'element',
   244→}
   245→
   246→export const CODE_BLOCK_NODE_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   247→  dependencies: [],
   248→  export: (node) => {
   249→    if (node.getType() !== 'code-block') return null
   250→    const j = node.exportJSON() as any
   251→    const f = fence(j.code || '')
   252→    return `${f}${j.language || ''}\n${j.code || ''}\n${f}`
   253→  },
   254→  regExp: NEVER,
   255→  replace: NOOP,
   256→  type: 'element',
   257→}
   258→
   259→export const LINK_CARD_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   260→  dependencies: [],
   261→  export: (node) => {
   262→    if (node.getType() !== 'link-card') return null
   263→    const j = node.exportJSON() as any
   264→    return j.title ? `[${j.title}](${j.url})` : `<${j.url}>`
   265→  },
   266→  regExp: NEVER,
   267→  replace: NOOP,
   268→  type: 'element',
   269→}
   270→
   271→export const MERMAID_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   272→  dependencies: [],
   273→  export: (node) => {
   274→    if (node.getType() !== 'mermaid') return null
   275→    const d = (node as any).__diagram ?? ''
   276→    const f = fence(d)
   277→    return `${f}mermaid\n${d}\n${f}`
   278→  },
   279→  regExp: NEVER,
   280→  replace: NOOP,
   281→  type: 'element',
   282→}
   283→
   284→export const GRID_CONTAINER_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   285→  dependencies: [],
   286→  export: (node) => {
   287→    if (node.getType() !== 'grid-container') return null
   288→    const j = node.exportJSON() as any
   289→    const cells = (j.cells ?? [])
   290→      .map((c: unknown) => `::: cell\n${stateText(c)}\n:::`)
   291→      .join('\n')
   292→    return `::: grid{cols=${j.cols ?? 2} gap="${qA(String(j.gap ?? '16px'))}"}\n${cells}\n:::`
   293→  },
   294→  regExp: NEVER,

   298→
   299→export const HORIZONTAL_RULE_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   300→  dependencies: [],
   301→  export: (node) => (node.getType() === 'horizontalrule' ? '---' : null),

   306→
   307→export const TABLE_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   308→  dependencies: [],
   309→  export: (node) => {
   310→    if (!$isTableNode(node)) return null
   311→    const rows = node.getChildren().filter($isTableRowNode)
   312→    if (rows.length === 0) return '|  |\n| --- |'
   313→    const data = rows.map((row) =>
   314→      row
   315→        .getChildren()
   316→        .filter($isTableCellNode)
   317→        .map((c) => escCell(c.getTextContent())),
   318→    )
   319→    const hdr = data[0]
   320→    const sep = hdr.map(() => '---')
   321→    return [
   322→      `| ${hdr.join(' | ')} |`,
   323→      `| ${sep.join(' | ')} |`,
   324→      ...data.slice(1).map((r) => `| ${r.join(' | ')} |`),
   325→    ].join('\n')
   326→  },
   327→  regExp: NEVER,
   328→  replace: NOOP,
   329→  type: 'element',
   330→}
   331→
   332→// ── Extension block transformers ──
   333→
   334→export const CODE_SNIPPET_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   335→  dependencies: [],
   336→  export: (node) => {
   337→    if (node.getType() !== 'code-snippet') return null
   338→    const j = node.exportJSON() as any
   339→    const body = (j.files ?? [])
   340→      .map((f: any) => {
   341→        const fc = fence(f.code || '')
   342→        return [
   343→          `::: file{name="${qA(f.filename || 'untitled')}" lang="${qA(f.language || '')}"}`,
   344→          `${fc}${f.language || ''}`,
   345→          f.code || '',
   346→          fc,
   347→          ':::',
   348→        ].join('\n')
   349→      })
   350→      .join('\n')
   351→    return `::: code-snippet\n${body}\n:::`
   352→  },
   353→  regExp: NEVER,
   354→  replace: NOOP,
   355→  type: 'element',
   356→}
   357→
   358→export const EMBED_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   359→  dependencies: [],
   360→  export: (node) =>
   361→    node.getType() === 'embed' ? `<${(node as any).__url || ''}>` : null,
   362→  regExp: NEVER,
   363→  replace: NOOP,
   364→  type: 'element',
   365→}
   366→
   367→export const GALLERY_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   368→  dependencies: [],
   369→  export: (node) => {
   370→    if (node.getType() !== 'gallery') return null
   371→    const imgs = (node.exportJSON() as any).images ?? []
   372→    return imgs.map((i: any) => `![${i.alt || ''}](${i.src || ''})`).join('\n')
   373→  },
   374→  regExp: NEVER,
   375→  replace: NOOP,
   376→  type: 'element',
   377→}
   378→
   379→export const EXCALIDRAW_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   380→  dependencies: [],
   381→  export: (node) =>
   382→    node.getType() === 'excalidraw'
   383→      ? `<excalidraw>\n${(node as any).__snapshot || ''}\n</excalidraw>`
   384→      : null,
   385→  regExp: NEVER,
   386→  replace: NOOP,
   387→  type: 'element',
   388→}
   389→
   390→// ── Aggregate ──
   391→
   392→export const allHeadlessTransformers = [
   393→  // Inline
   394→  SPOILER_TRANSFORMER,
   395→  MENTION_TRANSFORMER,
   396→  FOOTNOTE_TRANSFORMER,
   397→  INSERT_TRANSFORMER,
   398→  SUPERSCRIPT_TRANSFORMER,
   399→  SUBSCRIPT_TRANSFORMER,
   400→  RUBY_TRANSFORMER,
   401→  KATEX_INLINE_TRANSFORMER,
   402→  // Block (specific first)
   403→  FOOTNOTE_SECTION_TRANSFORMER,
   404→  CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER,
   405→  GIT_ALERT_TRANSFORMER,
   406→  CHECK_LIST,
   407→  KATEX_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   408→  IMAGE_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   409→  VIDEO_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   410→  CODE_BLOCK_NODE_TRANSFORMER,
   411→  LINK_CARD_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   412→  MERMAID_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   413→  GRID_CONTAINER_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   414→  HORIZONTAL_RULE_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   415→  TABLE_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   416→  CODE_SNIPPET_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   417→  EMBED_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   418→  GALLERY_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   419→  EXCALIDRAW_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   420→  // Standard (heading, quote, list, code, bold, italic, strikethrough, link…)
   421→  ...TRANSFORMERS,
   422→]
   423→
   424→/** Call inside editor.read() to convert current state to Markdown. */
   425→export function $toMarkdown(): string {
   426→  return $convertToMarkdownString(allHeadlessTransformers)
   427→}
   428→
```

     1→/**
     2→ * @haklex/rich-headless
     3→ *
     4→ * Headless-compatible Lexical node registry for server-side parsing.
     5→ * Zero React dependency — only lexical + standard @lexical/* packages.
     6→ *
     7→ * Usage with @lexical/headless:
     8→ *   import { createHeadlessEditor } from '@lexical/headless'
     9→ *   import { allHeadlessNodes } from '@haklex/rich-headless'
    10→ *   const editor = createHeadlessEditor({ nodes: allHeadlessNodes })
    11→ */
    12→
    13→import { CodeHighlightNode, CodeNode } from '@lexical/code'

    18→import { TableCellNode, TableNode, TableRowNode } from '@lexical/table'

    49→
    50→function stubDOM(): HTMLElement {
    51→  return document.createElement('span')
    52→}
    53→
    54→function extractText(state: unknown): string {
    55→  if (!state || typeof state !== 'object') return ''
    56→  const root = (state as Record<string, unknown>).root as
    57→    | Record<string, unknown>
    58→    | undefined
    59→  if (!root) return ''
    60→  return walkChildren(root)
    61→}
    62→
    63→function walkChildren(node: Record<string, unknown>): string {
    64→  const children = node.children as Record<string, unknown>[] | undefined
    65→  if (!children) return (node.text as string) ?? ''
    66→  return children.map(walkChildren).join('\n')
    67→}
    68→
    69→// ── SpoilerNode (ElementNode, inline) ──

    88→    return stubDOM()
    89→  }

   163→    node.__open = json.open ?? false
   164→    return node

   166→  exportJSON(): SerializedElementNode & { summary: string; open: boolean } {

   177→  updateDOM(): boolean {

   181→
   182→// ── Generic headless DecoratorNode ──
   183→
   184→type Props = Record<string, unknown>
   185→
   186→function headlessDecorator(
   187→  type: string,
   188→  propKeys: string[],
   189→  defaults: Props,
   190→  inline = false,
   191→) {
   192→  class Node extends DecoratorNode<null> {
   193→    constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
   194→      super(key)
   195→      for (const k of propKeys) {
   196→        ;(this as any)[`__${k}`] = defaults[k]
   197→      }
   198→    }
   199→    static getType(): string {
   200→      return type
   201→    }
   202→    static clone(node: Node): Node {
   203→      const n = new Node((node as any).__key)
   204→      for (const k of propKeys) {
   205→        ;(n as any)[`__${k}`] = (node as any)[`__${k}`]
   206→      }
   207→      return n
   208→    }
   209→    static importJSON(json: SerializedLexicalNode & Props): Node {
   210→      const node = new Node()
   211→      for (const k of propKeys) {
   212→        ;(node as any)[`__${k}`] = json[k] ?? defaults[k]
   213→      }
   214→      return node
   215→    }
   216→    exportJSON(): SerializedLexicalNode & Props {
   217→      const out: Props = { type, version: 1 }
   218→      for (const k of propKeys) {
   219→        out[k] = (this as any)[`__${k}`]
   220→      }
   221→      return out as SerializedLexicalNode & Props
   222→    }
   223→    createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   224→      return stubDOM()
   225→    }
   226→    updateDOM(): boolean {
   227→      return false
   228→    }
   229→    decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): null {
   230→      return null
   231→    }
   232→    isInline(): boolean {
   233→      return inline
   234→    }
   235→  }
   236→  return Node as unknown as Klass<LexicalNode>
   237→}

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import { useLexicalNodeSelection } from '@lexical/react/useLexicalNodeSelection'
     3→import {
     4→  $createNodeSelection,
     5→  $createParagraphNode,
     6→  $getNodeByKey,
     7→  $isDecoratorNode,
     8→  $isElementNode,
     9→  $setSelection,
    10→} from 'lexical'
    11→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
    12→
    13→import { $isCodeBlockNode } from '../../nodes/CodeBlockNode'
    14→import {
    15→  consumeCodeBlockCursorIntent,
    16→  setCodeBlockCursorIntent,
    17→} from '../../utils/codeBlockSelectionIntent'
    18→import { CodeBlockRenderer } from '../renderers/CodeBlockRenderer'
    19→import { RendererWrapper } from '../RendererWrapper'
    20→
    21→interface CodeBlockEditDecoratorProps {
    22→  nodeKey: string
    23→  code: string
    24→  language: string
    25→}
    26→
    27→export function CodeBlockEditDecorator({
    28→  nodeKey,
    29→  code,
    30→  language,
    31→}: CodeBlockEditDecoratorProps) {
    32→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    33→  const [isSelected] = useLexicalNodeSelection(nodeKey)
    34→  const [cursorPlacement, setCursorPlacement] = useState<'start' | 'end'>(
    35→    'start',
    36→  )
    37→  const editable = editor.isEditable()
    38→
    39→  useEffect(() => {
    40→    if (!editable || !isSelected) return
    41→    setCursorPlacement(consumeCodeBlockCursorIntent(nodeKey) ?? 'start')
    42→  }, [editable, isSelected, nodeKey])
    43→
    44→  const handleCodeChange = useCallback(
    45→    (newCode: string) => {
    46→      editor.update(() => {
    47→        const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    48→        if ($isCodeBlockNode(node)) {
    49→          node.setCode(newCode)
    50→        }
    51→      })
    52→    },
    53→    [editor, nodeKey],
    54→  )
    55→
    56→  const handleLanguageChange = useCallback(
    57→    (newLanguage: string) => {
    58→      editor.update(() => {
    59→        const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    60→        if ($isCodeBlockNode(node)) {
    61→          node.setLanguage(newLanguage)
    62→        }
    63→      })
    64→    },
    65→    [editor, nodeKey],
    66→  )
    67→
    68→  const handleDelete = useCallback(() => {
    69→    editor.getRootElement()?.focus({ preventScroll: true })
    70→    editor.update(() => {
    71→      const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    72→      if (!node) return
    73→
    74→      const prev = node.getPreviousSibling()
    75→      const next = node.getNextSibling()
    76→      const parent = node.getParent()
    77→      node.remove()
    78→
    79→      if (prev) {
    80→        if ($isElementNode(prev)) {
    81→          prev.selectEnd()
    82→        } else {
    83→          if ($isDecoratorNode(prev) && prev.getType() === 'code-block') {
    84→            setCodeBlockCursorIntent(prev.getKey(), 'end')
    85→          }
    86→          const selection = $createNodeSelection()
    87→          selection.add(prev.getKey())
    88→          $setSelection(selection)
    89→        }
    90→        return
    91→      }
    92→
    93→      if (next) {
    94→        if ($isElementNode(next)) {
    95→          next.selectStart()
    96→        } else {
    97→          if ($isDecoratorNode(next) && next.getType() === 'code-block') {
    98→            setCodeBlockCursorIntent(next.getKey(), 'start')
    99→          }
   100→          const selection = $createNodeSelection()
   101→          selection.add(next.getKey())
   102→          $setSelection(selection)
   103→        }
   104→        return
   105→      }
   106→
   107→      if (parent) {
   108→        const p = $createParagraphNode()
   109→        parent.append(p)
   110→        p.selectStart()
   111→      }
   112→    })
   113→  }, [editor, nodeKey])
   114→
   115→  const handleExitBlock = useCallback(
   116→    (direction: 'before' | 'after') => {
   117→      editor.getRootElement()?.focus({ preventScroll: true })
   118→      editor.update(() => {
   119→        const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
   120→        if (!node) return
   121→
   122→        if (direction === 'before') {
   123→          const prev = node.getPreviousSibling()
   124→          if (!prev) return
   125→
   126→          if ($isElementNode(prev)) {
   127→            prev.selectEnd()
   128→          } else {
   129→            if ($isDecoratorNode(prev) && prev.getType() === 'code-block') {
   130→              setCodeBlockCursorIntent(prev.getKey(), 'end')
   131→            }
   132→            const selection = $createNodeSelection()
   133→            selection.add(prev.getKey())
   134→            $setSelection(selection)
   135→          }
   136→          return
   137→        }
   138→
   139→        let next = node.getNextSibling()
   140→        if (!next) {
   141→          const p = $createParagraphNode()
   142→          node.insertAfter(p)
   143→          next = p
   144→        }
   145→
   146→        if ($isElementNode(next)) {
   147→          next.selectStart()
   148→        } else {
   149→          if ($isDecoratorNode(next) && next.getType() === 'code-block') {
   150→            setCodeBlockCursorIntent(next.getKey(), 'start')
   151→          }
   152→          const selection = $createNodeSelection()
   153→          selection.add(next.getKey())
   154→          $setSelection(selection)
   155→        }
   156→      })
   157→    },
   158→    [editor, nodeKey],
   159→  )
   160→
   161→  return (
   162→    <RendererWrapper
   163→      rendererKey="CodeBlock"
   164→      defaultRenderer={CodeBlockRenderer}
   165→      props={{
   166→        code,
   167→        language,
   168→        editable,
   169→        onCodeChange: editable ? handleCodeChange : undefined,
   170→        onLanguageChange: editable ? handleLanguageChange : undefined,
   171→        onDelete: editable ? handleDelete : undefined,
   172→        onExitBlock: editable ? handleExitBlock : undefined,
   173→        selected: editable ? isSelected : false,
   174→        cursorPlacement: editable ? cursorPlacement : 'start',
   175→      }}
   176→    />
   177→  )
   178→}
   179→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { useColorScheme } from '../../context/ColorSchemeContext'
     4→import { useVariant } from '../../context/RendererConfigContext'
     5→import type { CodeToHtmlFn } from '../../utils/shiki'
     6→import { loadCodeToHtml } from '../../utils/shiki'
     7→
     8→export interface CodeBlockRendererProps {
     9→  code: string
    10→  language: string
    11→  showLineNumbers?: boolean
    12→  editable?: boolean
    13→  selected?: boolean
    14→  cursorPlacement?: 'start' | 'end'
    15→  onCodeChange?: (code: string) => void
    16→  onLanguageChange?: (language: string) => void
    17→  onDelete?: () => void
    18→  onExitBlock?: (direction: 'before' | 'after') => void
    19→}
    20→
    21→export function CodeBlockRenderer({
    22→  code,
    23→  language,
    24→  showLineNumbers: showLineNumbersProp,
    25→}: CodeBlockRendererProps) {
    26→  const variant = useVariant()
    27→  const showLineNumbers = showLineNumbersProp ?? variant !== 'comment'
    28→  const colorScheme = useColorScheme()
    29→  const shikiTheme = colorScheme === 'dark' ? 'github-dark' : 'github-light'
    30→  const [highlightedHtml, setHighlightedHtml] = useState<string | null>(null)
    31→  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false)
    32→  const copyTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined)
    33→
    34→  useEffect(() => {
    35→    let cancelled = false
    36→    setHighlightedHtml(null)
    37→
    38→    loadCodeToHtml()
    39→      .then((toHtml: CodeToHtmlFn) =>
    40→        toHtml(code, {
    41→          lang: language,
    42→          theme: shikiTheme,
    43→        }),
    44→      )
    45→      .then((html: string) => {
    46→        if (!cancelled) {
    47→          setHighlightedHtml(html)
    48→        }
    49→      })
    50→      .catch(() => {
    51→        if (!cancelled) {
    52→          setHighlightedHtml(null)
    53→        }
    54→      })
    55→
    56→    return () => {
    57→      cancelled = true
    58→    }
    59→  }, [code, language, shikiTheme])
    60→
    61→  useEffect(() => {
    62→    return () => clearTimeout(copyTimerRef.current)
    63→  }, [])
    64→
    65→  const handleCopy = useCallback(() => {
    66→    navigator.clipboard
    67→      .writeText(code)
    68→      .then(() => {
    69→        setCopied(true)
    70→        clearTimeout(copyTimerRef.current)
    71→        copyTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000)
    72→      })
    73→      .catch(() => {})
    74→  }, [code])
    75→
    76→  const header = language ? (
    77→    <div className="rich-code-block-header">
    78→      <span className="rich-code-block-lang">{language}</span>
    79→      <button
    80→        type="button"
    81→        className="rich-code-block-copy"
    82→        onClick={handleCopy}
    83→        aria-label={copied ? 'Copied to clipboard' : 'Copy code'}
    84→      >
    85→        {copied ? 'Copied' : 'Copy'}
    86→      </button>
    87→    </div>
    88→  ) : null
    89→
    90→  const wrapperClass = showLineNumbers
    91→    ? 'rich-code-block rich-code-block-numbered'
    92→    : 'rich-code-block'
    93→
    94→  if (highlightedHtml) {
    95→    return (
    96→      <div className={wrapperClass}>
    97→        {header}
    98→        <div dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: highlightedHtml }} />
    99→      </div>
   100→    )
   101→  }
   102→
   103→  const lines = code.split('\n')
   104→  return (
   105→    <div className={wrapperClass}>
   106→      {header}
   107→      <pre>
   108→        <code>
   109→          {lines.map((line, i) => (
   110→            <span key={i} className="line">
   111→              {line}
   112→              {i < lines.length - 1 ? '\n' : ''}
   113→            </span>
   114→          ))}
   115→        </code>
   116→      </pre>
   117→    </div>
   118→  )
   119→}
   120→
```

     1→import type { ComponentType, ReactElement } from 'react'
     2→import { createElement } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import { useRendererConfig } from '../context/RendererConfigContext'
     5→import type { RendererConfig } from '../types/renderer-config'
     6→
     7→export type RendererKey = keyof RendererConfig
     8→
     9→type RendererPropsByKey = {
    10→  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]> extends ComponentType<
    11→    infer P extends object
    12→  >
    13→    ? P
    14→    : never
    15→}
    16→
    17→type RendererComponentByKey = {
    18→  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<
    19→    RendererConfig[K]
    20→  > extends ComponentType<any>
    21→    ? NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]>
    22→    : never
    23→}
    24→
    25→export type RendererWrapperProps = {
    26→  [K in RendererKey]-?: {
    27→    /** Name of the renderer in RendererConfig */
    28→    rendererKey: K
    29→    /** Default renderer component */
    30→    defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K]
    31→    /** Props to pass to the renderer */
    32→    props: RendererPropsByKey[K]
    33→  }
    34→}[RendererKey]
    35→
    36→/**
    37→ * Wrapper component that allows overriding default renderers with custom ones.
    38→ * Uses RendererConfig from context to determine which renderer to use.
    39→ */
    40→export function RendererWrapper({
    41→  rendererKey,
    42→  defaultRenderer: DefaultRenderer,
    43→  props,
    44→}: RendererWrapperProps) {
    45→  const config = useRendererConfig()
    46→  const Renderer: ComponentType<any> = config?.[rendererKey] ?? DefaultRenderer
    47→
    48→  return <Renderer {...props} />
    49→}
    50→
    51→/**
    52→ * Type-safe helper for creating RendererWrapper elements from .ts node files.
    53→ * Avoids the createElement + discriminated-union typing limitation.
    54→ */

## Comprehensive Codebase Exploration Report

Based on my thorough exploration of your `@haklex/rich-editor` codebase, here's everything you need to build a markdown-on-paste plugin:

### 1. Existing Paste Handling Flow

**ImageUploadPlugin** (lines 194-217) shows the pattern:

```typescript
// Registers PASTE_COMMAND with COMMAND_PRIORITY_HIGH
const unregisterPaste = editor.registerCommand(
  PASTE_COMMAND,
  (event: ClipboardEvent | InputEvent | KeyboardEvent) => {
    const clipboardData = 'clipboardData' in event ? (event as ClipboardEvent).clipboardData : null
    if (!clipboardData) return false
    
    const files = Array.from(clipboardData.files)
    if (files.some(isImageFile)) {
      return handleFiles(files)  // Returns true to consume command
    }
    return false  // Passes through to next handler
  },
  COMMAND_PRIORITY_HIGH,  // Higher priority = processed before lower priorities
)
```

**Key insights:**
- Registers with `COMMAND_PRIORITY_HIGH` to intercept before default paste
- Returns `true` to consume the command (prevents further handlers)
- Returns `false` to pass through to next handler
- Receives `ClipboardEvent | InputEvent | KeyboardEvent`
- Your plugin should use similar priority and return logic

```typescript
import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
import { $insertNodes, COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR, createCommand } from 'lexical'
import { useEffect } from 'react'

export const INSERT_ALERT_COMMAND = createCommand<AlertType>('INSERT_ALERT')

export function AlertPlugin() {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()

  useEffect(() => {
    return editor.registerCommand(
      INSERT_ALERT_COMMAND,
      (alertType) => {
        $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteEditNode(alertType)])
        return true
      },
      COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR,
    )
  }, [editor])

  return null
}
```

### 9. CodeBlock Node Pattern (from transformers)

The `CODE_BLOCK_MULTILINE_TRANSFORMER` (lines 14-41 in `code-block.ts`) shows how to create nodes within transformers:
```typescript
regExpStart: /^[ \t]*```([\w-]+)?/,
regExpEnd: { optional: true, regExp: /[ \t]*```$/ },
replace: (rootNode, _children, startMatch, _endMatch, linesInBetween) => {
  const lang = startMatch[1] || ''  // Extract language from regex group
  let code = ''
  if (linesInBetween) {
    const lines = [...linesInBetween]
    // Trim leading/trailing empty lines
    while (lines.length > 0 && !lines[0].length) lines.shift()
    while (lines.length > 0 && !lines.at(-1)?.length) lines.pop()
    code = lines.join('\n')
  }
  
  const Klass = findCodeBlockKlass(getResolvedEditNodes())
  const node = new (Klass as any)(code, lang)
  rootNode.replace(node)
}
```

The existing infrastructure is **fully ready**: all transformers are defined, ALL_TRANSFORMERS is composed and exported, and `@lexical/markdown` provides `$convertFromMarkdownString` out of the box.

## CodeBlock Node Architecture in @haklex/rich-editor

### 1. **CodeBlockNode (Base/Static Node)**

**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/nodes/CodeBlockNode.ts`

**Purpose**: Read-only rendering of code blocks with syntax highlighting.

**Class Structure**:
- Extends `DecoratorNode<ReactElement>`
- Stores two private properties: `__code` (string) and `__language` (string)
- Type identifier: `'code-block'`

**Constructor & Creation**:
```typescript
new CodeBlockNode(code: string, language: string, key?: NodeKey)
$createCodeBlockNode(code: string, language: string): CodeBlockNode
$isCodeBlockNode(node): boolean
```

**Key Methods**:
- `getCode()` / `setCode(code)` — getter/setter for code content
- `getLanguage()` / `setLanguage(language)` — getter/setter for language identifier
- `importJSON(serialized)` — deserializes from JSON with `code` and `language` fields
- `exportJSON()` — serializes with `code`, `language`, `type: 'code-block'`, and `version: 1`
- `decorate()` — returns `RendererWrapper` (via `createRendererDecoration`) wrapping `CodeBlockRenderer` with code + language props
- `createDOM()` — creates `<div class="rich-code-block-wrapper">`
- `updateDOM()` — returns `false` (no DOM updates; all changes go through React re-render)
- `isInline()` → `false`
- `isKeyboardSelectable()` → `true`

**Slash Menu Integration**:
- Static property `slashMenuItems` provides UI for inserting via `/code` command
- Icon: `lucide-react`'s `Code` icon
- Section: `'MEDIA'`
- Creates node with empty code and `'text'` language by default

---

### 2. **CodeBlockEditNode (Edit/Interactive Variant)**

**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/nodes/CodeBlockEditNode.ts`

**Purpose**: Full editing capabilities with interactive UI for changing code, language, and navigation.

**Inheritance**:
```typescript
class CodeBlockEditNode extends CodeBlockNode
```
- Reuses all getters, setters, and serialization from base
- Overrides only `clone()`, `importJSON()`, and `decorate()` for editor context

**Key Differences from Base**:
1. **decorate()** — returns `CodeBlockEditDecorator` directly instead of `RendererWrapper`
   - Passes `nodeKey`, `code`, `language` as props
   - No custom renderer injection point (edit path is fixed)

2. **importJSON()** — explicitly creates `CodeBlockEditNode` instance (not generic factory)

3. **Slash Menu** — maps base menu items but modifies `onSelect` to insert `CodeBlockEditNode` instead of base node

**Creation**:
```typescript

new CodeBlockEditNode(code, language)
```

---

### 3. **CodeBlockRenderer (Static Display Component)**

**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/CodeBlockRenderer.tsx`

**Props**:
```typescript
interface CodeBlockRendererProps {
  code: string
  language: string
  showLineNumbers?: boolean         // Defaults to true unless variant='comment'
  editable?: boolean                // Read-only mode flag
  selected?: boolean                // Selection highlight (edit only)
  cursorPlacement?: 'start' | 'end' // Nested editor focus point (edit only)
  onCodeChange?: (code: string) => void
  onLanguageChange?: (language: string) => void
  onDelete?: () => void
  onExitBlock?: (direction: 'before' | 'after') => void
}
```

**Rendering Logic**:
1. **Syntax Highlighting**: Uses Shiki (lazy-loaded via `loadCodeToHtml()`)
   - Theme: `'github-dark'` or `'github-light'` based on `ColorSchemeContext`
   - Output: `<div dangerouslySetInnerHTML>` with highlighted HTML

2. **Fallback**: If Shiki unavailable, renders raw `<pre><code>` with line splits

3. **Header**: Displays language tag + "Copy" button (copies to clipboard)

4. **Line Numbers**: CSS class `'rich-code-block-numbered'` applied when `showLineNumbers=true`

**Styling Classes**:
- `.rich-code-block` — base wrapper
- `.rich-code-block-numbered` — when line numbers shown
- `.rich-code-block-header` — language + copy button container
- `.rich-code-block-lang` — language label
- `.rich-code-block-copy` — copy button

---

### 4. **CodeBlockEditDecorator (Interactive Wrapper)**

**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/CodeBlockEditDecorator.tsx`

**Purpose**: Wraps `CodeBlockRenderer` with full editing logic and state management.

**Props**:
```typescript
interface CodeBlockEditDecoratorProps {
  nodeKey: string
  code: string
  language: string
}
```

**State Management**:
- `isSelected` — Lexical node selection state (via `useLexicalNodeSelection`)
- `cursorPlacement` — `'start' | 'end'` for nested editor focus (consumed from intent map on selection)
- `editable` — editor mode flag

**Handlers** (passed to `CodeBlockRenderer` only when editable):

1. **handleCodeChange(newCode)** — updates node via `node.setCode()`
2. **handleLanguageChange(newLanguage)** — updates node via `node.setLanguage()`
3. **handleDelete()** — removes node and navigates to previous/next sibling or creates new paragraph
   - Sets cursor intent on adjacent code blocks for smooth navigation
4. **handleExitBlock(direction)** — exits block (keyboard Ctrl+Up/Down)
   - `'before'` → selects previous sibling
   - `'after'` → selects next sibling or creates paragraph

**Navigation Pattern**: Uses `codeBlockSelectionIntent` map to preserve cursor placement across decorator re-renders (prevents focus loss on code edits).

---

### 5. **Markdown Transformer**

**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/transformers/code-block.ts`

**Type**: `MultilineElementTransformer` (from `@lexical/markdown`)

**Pattern**:
```regex
Start: /^[ \t]*```([\w-]+)?/
End:   /[ \t]*```$/  (optional)
```

**Processing**:
1. Captures optional language identifier after opening `` ``` ``
2. Collects all lines between start/end markers
3. Trims leading/trailing blank lines
4. Creates node via `findCodeBlockKlass()` — automatically uses `CodeBlockEditNode` from `getResolvedEditNodes()` in editor context

**Key Feature**: Dynamic node class resolution
- Searches for `getType() === 'code-block'` in resolved edit nodes
- Falls back to `CodeBlockNode` if not found
- Allows plugins/extensions to override node type

- Inline transformers first (spoiler, mention, footnote, etc.)

## Summary: Paste Detection Plugin Integration Points

For a **paste detection plugin**, the CodeBlock architecture reveals:

1. **Node Creation**: Use `$createCodeBlockNode(code, language)` or intercept at `CodeBlockEditNode` level

5. **Transformer Integration**: CODE_BLOCK_MULTILINE_TRANSFORMER already handles markdown fence → node conversion; paste plugin could supplement with paste event detection
6. **Cursor Intent**: Use `setCodeBlockCursorIntent(nodeKey, placement)` to preserve focus after programmatic edits

    33→function isImageFile(file: File): boolean {
    34→  return file.type.startsWith('image/')
    35→}
    36→
    37→function hasImageData(dataTransfer: DataTransfer | null): boolean {
    38→  if (!dataTransfer) return false
    39→
    40→  if (Array.from(dataTransfer.files).some(isImageFile)) return true
    41→  return Array.from(dataTransfer.items).some((item) =>
    42→    item.type.startsWith('image/'),
    43→  )
    44→}
    45→
    46→function isSafeImageUrl(url: string): boolean {
    47→  return !/^(?:javascript\s*:|vbscript\s*:|data\s*:(?!image\/))/i.test(url)
    48→}
    49→
    50→function loadImageByUrl(
    51→  src: string,
    52→): Promise<{ width: number; height: number }> {
    53→  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    54→    const image = new Image()
    55→    image.onload = () => {
    56→      resolve({
    57→        width: image.naturalWidth || image.width,
    58→        height: image.naturalHeight || image.height,
    59→      })
    60→    }
    61→    image.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Failed to load image'))
    62→    image.src = src
    63→  })
    64→}
    65→
    66→function readAsDataUrl(file: File): Promise<string> {
    67→  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    68→    const reader = new FileReader()
    69→    reader.onload = () => resolve(String(reader.result))
    70→    reader.onerror = () => reject(reader.error ?? new Error('File read failed'))
    71→    reader.readAsDataURL(file)
    72→  })
    73→}
    74→
    75→export async function defaultImageUpload(
