   156→          })
   157→          $insertNodes([node])
   158→        })
   159→
   160→        if (closeDialog) {
   161→          setDialogOpen(false)
   162→          setUrlInput('')
   163→          setUrlPreview(null)
   164→          setUrlMeta(null)
   165→          setUrlError(null)
   166→        }
   167→        pushToast('success', 'Image uploaded')
   168→        return true
   169→      } catch (err: unknown) {
   170→        console.error('[ImageUploadPlugin]', err)
   171→        pushToast('error', 'Image upload failed')
   172→        return false
   173→      } finally {
   174→        setPendingUploads((value) => Math.max(value - 1, 0))
   175→        setDialogUploading(false)
   176→      }
   177→    },
   178→    [editor, pushToast],
   179→  )
   180→
   181→  const handleFiles = useCallback(
   182→    (files: File[]): boolean => {
   183→      const images = files.filter(isImageFile)
   184→      if (images.length === 0) return false
   185→
   186→      for (const file of images) {
   187→        void insertByUpload(file)
   188→      }
   189→      return true
   190→    },
   191→    [insertByUpload],
   192→  )
   193→
   194→  useEffect(() => {
   195→    const unregisterDragDrop = editor.registerCommand(
   196→      DRAG_DROP_PASTE,
   197→      (files: File[]) => handleFiles(files),
   198→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_HIGH,
   199→    )
   200→
   201→    const unregisterPaste = editor.registerCommand(
   202→      PASTE_COMMAND,
   203→      (event: ClipboardEvent | InputEvent | KeyboardEvent) => {
   204→        const clipboardData =
   205→          'clipboardData' in event
   206→            ? (event as ClipboardEvent).clipboardData
   207→            : null
   208→        if (!clipboardData) return false
   209→
   210→        const files = Array.from(clipboardData.files)
   211→        if (files.some(isImageFile)) {
   212→          return handleFiles(files)
   213→        }
   214→        return false
   215→      },
   216→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_HIGH,
   217→    )
   218→
   219→    const unregisterOpenDialog = editor.registerCommand(
   220→      OPEN_IMAGE_UPLOAD_DIALOG_COMMAND,
   221→      () => {
   222→        setDialogOpen(true)
   223→        return true
   224→      },
   225→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR,
   226→    )
   227→
   228→    const rootElement = editor.getRootElement()
   229→    const wrapper = rootElement?.parentElement ?? null
   230→    if (!wrapper) {
   231→      return () => {
   232→        unregisterDragDrop()
   233→        unregisterPaste()
   234→        unregisterOpenDialog()
   235→      }
   236→    }
   237→
   238→    let dragCounter = 0
   239→
   240→    const setWrapperDragging = (next: boolean) => {
   241→      setRootDragActive(next)
   242→      wrapper.classList.toggle(css.draggingWrapperClass, next)
   243→    }
   244→
   245→    const onDragEnter = (event: DragEvent) => {
   246→      if (!hasImageData(event.dataTransfer)) return
   247→      dragCounter += 1
   248→      setWrapperDragging(true)
   249→    }
   250→
   251→    const onDragOver = (event: DragEvent) => {
   252→      if (!hasImageData(event.dataTransfer)) return
   253→      event.preventDefault()
   254→    }
   255→
   256→    const onDragLeave = () => {
   257→      dragCounter = Math.max(dragCounter - 1, 0)
   258→      if (dragCounter === 0) {
   259→        setWrapperDragging(false)
   260→      }
   261→    }
   262→
   263→    const onDrop = () => {
   264→      dragCounter = 0
   265→      setWrapperDragging(false)
   266→    }
   267→
   268→    rootElement?.addEventListener('dragenter', onDragEnter)
   269→    rootElement?.addEventListener('dragover', onDragOver)
   270→    rootElement?.addEventListener('dragleave', onDragLeave)
   271→    rootElement?.addEventListener('drop', onDrop)
   272→
   273→    return () => {
   274→      if (toastTimerRef.current) {
   275→        window.clearTimeout(toastTimerRef.current)
   276→      }
   277→      unregisterDragDrop()
   278→      unregisterPaste()
   279→      unregisterOpenDialog()
   280→      setWrapperDragging(false)
   281→      rootElement?.removeEventListener('dragenter', onDragEnter)
   282→      rootElement?.removeEventListener('dragover', onDragOver)
   283→      rootElement?.removeEventListener('dragleave', onDragLeave)
   284→      rootElement?.removeEventListener('drop', onDrop)
   285→    }
   286→  }, [editor, handleFiles])
   287→
   288→  const resetUrlState = useCallback(() => {
   289→    setUrlInput('')
   290→    setUrlPreview(null)
   291→    setUrlMeta(null)
   292→    setUrlError(null)
   293→    setUrlLoading(false)
   294→  }, [])
   295→
   296→  const handleDialogFile = useCallback(
   297→    async (file: File | null) => {
   298→      if (!file) return
   299→      await insertByUpload(file, { closeDialog: true })
   300→    },
   301→    [insertByUpload],
   302→  )
   303→
   304→  const handleUrlPreview = useCallback(async () => {
   305→    const nextUrl = urlInput.trim()
   306→    if (!nextUrl) return
   307→    if (!isSafeImageUrl(nextUrl)) {
   308→      setUrlError('Unsupported URL scheme')
   309→      return
   310→    }
   311→
   312→    setUrlLoading(true)
   313→    setUrlError(null)
   314→    try {
   315→      const meta = await loadImageByUrl(nextUrl)
   316→      setUrlMeta(meta)
   317→      setUrlPreview(nextUrl)
   318→    } catch {
   319→      setUrlPreview(null)
   320→      setUrlMeta(null)
   321→      setUrlError('Could not load this image URL')
   322→    } finally {
   323→      setUrlLoading(false)
   324→    }
   325→  }, [urlInput])
   326→
   327→  const handleInsertByUrl = useCallback(() => {
   328→    if (!urlPreview || !isSafeImageUrl(urlPreview)) return
   329→
   330→    editor.update(() => {
   331→      const node = $createImageNode({
   332→        src: urlPreview,
   333→        altText: '',
   334→        width: urlMeta?.width,
   335→        height: urlMeta?.height,
   336→      })
   337→      $insertNodes([node])
   338→    })
   339→    pushToast('success', 'Image inserted')
   340→    setDialogOpen(false)
   341→    resetUrlState()
   342→  }, [editor, pushToast, resetUrlState, urlMeta, urlPreview])
   343→
   344→  const helperMessage =
   345→    pendingUploads > 0
   346→      ? `Uploading ${pendingUploads} image${pendingUploads > 1 ? 's' : ''}...`
   347→      : rootDragActive
   348→        ? 'Drop image files to upload'
   349→        : null
   350→
   351→  return (
   352→    <>
   353→      {(helperMessage || toast) && (
   354→        <div className={css.toastStack}>
   355→          {helperMessage && (
   356→            <div className={`${css.toast} ${css.toastVariant.info}`}>
   357→              <span className={css.spinner} />
   358→              {helperMessage}
   359→            </div>
   360→          )}
   361→          {toast && (
   362→            <div className={`${css.toast} ${css.toastVariant[toast.kind]}`}>
   363→              {toast.kind === 'success' ? (
   364→                <Check size={12} />
   365→              ) : (
   366→                <Info size={12} />
   367→              )}
   368→              {toast.message}
   369→            </div>
   370→          )}
   371→        </div>
   372→      )}
   373→
   374→      <Dialog
   375→        open={dialogOpen}
   376→        onOpenChange={(nextOpen) => {
   377→          if (!nextOpen && dialogUploading) return
   378→          setDialogOpen(nextOpen)
   379→          if (!nextOpen) {
   380→            resetUrlState()
   381→            setDialogUploading(false)
   382→            setDialogDragActive(false)
   383→          }
   384→        }}
   385→      >
   386→        <DialogPopup
   387→          className={css.dialogPopup}
   388→          showCloseButton={!dialogUploading}
   389→        >
   390→          <div className={css.dialogHeader}>
   391→            <DialogTitle className={css.dialogTitle}>Insert image</DialogTitle>
   392→          </div>
   393→
   394→          <div className={css.dialogBody}>
   395→            <div className={css.tabWrap}>
   396→              <SegmentedControl
   397→                items={tabItems}
   398→                value={tab}
   399→                onChange={setTab}
   400→                fullWidth
   401→              />
   402→            </div>
   403→
   404→            {tab === 'upload' ? (
   405→              <div
   406→                role="button"
   407→                tabIndex={0}
   408→                className={`${css.uploadDropzone} ${css.uploadDropzoneState[dialogUploading ? 'busy' : dialogDragActive ? 'active' : 'idle']}`}
   409→                onClick={() => {
   410→                  if (!dialogUploading) fileInputRef.current?.click()
   411→                }}
   412→                onKeyDown={(event) => {
   413→                  if (event.key !== 'Enter' && event.key !== ' ') return
   414→                  event.preventDefault()
   415→                  if (!dialogUploading) fileInputRef.current?.click()
   416→                }}
   417→                onDragEnter={(event) => {
   418→                  if (hasImageData(event.dataTransfer)) {
   419→                    event.preventDefault()
   420→                    setDialogDragActive(true)
   421→                  }
   422→                }}
   423→                onDragOver={(event) => {
   424→                  if (hasImageData(event.dataTransfer)) {
   425→                    event.preventDefault()
   426→                  }
   427→                }}
   428→                onDragLeave={() => setDialogDragActive(false)}
   429→                onDrop={(event) => {
   430→                  event.preventDefault()
   431→                  setDialogDragActive(false)
   432→                  const file = Array.from(event.dataTransfer.files).find(
   433→                    isImageFile,
   434→                  )
   435→                  void handleDialogFile(file ?? null)
   436→                }}
   437→              >
   438→                <input
   439→                  ref={fileInputRef}
   440→                  className={css.hiddenInput}
   441→                  type="file"
   442→                  accept="image/*"
   443→                  onChange={(event) => {
   444→                    const file = event.currentTarget.files?.[0] ?? null
   445→                    void handleDialogFile(file)
   446→                    event.currentTarget.value = ''
   447→                  }}
   448→                />
   449→
   450→                {dialogUploading ? (
   451→                  <div className={css.uploadBusyWrap}>
   452→                    <div className={css.uploadProgress}>
   453→                      <span className={css.spinner} />
   454→                      Uploading image...
   455→                    </div>
   456→                  </div>
   457→                ) : (
   458→                  <>
   459→                    <span className={css.uploadDropIcon}>
   460→                      <Upload size={18} />
   461→                    </span>
   462→                    <span className={css.uploadDropTitle}>
   463→                      Click to upload or drag and drop
   464→                    </span>
   465→                    <span className={css.uploadDropDesc}>
   466→                      PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP
   467→                    </span>
   468→                  </>
   469→                )}
   470→              </div>
   471→            ) : (
   472→              <>
   473→                <div className={css.urlInputRow}>
   474→                  <input
   475→                    className={css.textInput}
   476→                    type="url"
   477→                    placeholder="https://example.com/image.jpg"
   478→                    value={urlInput}
   479→                    onChange={(event) => {
   480→                      setUrlInput(event.target.value)
   481→                      setUrlError(null)
   482→                      setUrlPreview(null)
   483→                      setUrlMeta(null)
   484→                    }}
   485→                    onKeyDown={(event) => {
   486→                      if (event.key === 'Enter') {
   487→                        event.preventDefault()
   488→                        if (urlPreview) {
   489→                          handleInsertByUrl()
   490→                        } else {
   491→                          void handleUrlPreview()
   492→                        }
   493→                      }
   494→                    }}
   495→                  />
   496→                  <button
   497→                    type="button"
   498→                    className={css.secondaryButton}
   499→                    disabled={urlLoading || !urlInput.trim()}
   500→                    onClick={() => void handleUrlPreview()}
   501→                  >
   502→                    {urlLoading ? 'Loading' : 'Preview'}
   503→                  </button>
   504→                  <button
   505→                    type="button"
   506→                    className={css.actionButton}
   507→                    disabled={!urlPreview}
   508→                    onClick={handleInsertByUrl}
   509→                  >
   510→                    Insert
   511→                  </button>
   512→                </div>
   513→
   514→                {urlError && (
   515→                  <span
   516→                    className={`${css.helperText} ${css.toastVariant.error}`}
   517→                  >
   518→                    <Info size={12} />
   519→                    {urlError}
   520→                  </span>
   521→                )}
   522→
   523→                {urlPreview && (
   524→                  <div className={css.urlPreview}>
   525→                    <img
   526→                      className={css.urlPreviewImage}
   527→                      src={urlPreview}
   528→                      alt="Preview"
   529→                    />
   530→                  </div>
   531→                )}
   532→              </>
   533→            )}
   534→          </div>
   535→
   536→          <div className={css.dialogFooter}>
   537→            <span className={css.helperText}>
   538→              <Link2 size={12} />
   539→              You can also paste images or drag files directly into the editor.
   540→            </span>
   541→            <div className={css.dialogFooterActions}>
   542→              <button
   543→                type="button"
   544→                className={css.secondaryButton}
   545→                onClick={() => setDialogOpen(false)}
   546→                disabled={dialogUploading}
   547→              >
   548→                Close
   549→              </button>
   550→            </div>
   551→          </div>
   552→        </DialogPopup>
   553→      </Dialog>
   554→    </>
   555→  )
   556→}
   557→

    28→
    29→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    30→
    31→type MarkdownEditorProps = {
    32→  value: string
    33→  onChange: (value: string) => void
    34→  placeholder?: string
    35→  onSubmit?: () => void
    36→  autoFocus?: boolean
    37→  scrollIntoView?: boolean
    38→  className?: string
    39→  contentClassName?: string
    40→  actions?: ReactNode

    42→}
    43→
    44→const editorNodes = [
    45→  HeadingNode,
    46→  QuoteNode,
    47→  ListNode,
    48→  ListItemNode,
    49→  LinkNode,
    50→  AutoLinkNode,
    51→  CodeNode,
    52→]
    53→
    54→export const MarkdownEditor = ({
    55→  value,
    56→  onChange,
    57→  placeholder,
    58→  onSubmit,
    59→  autoFocus,
    60→  scrollIntoView,
    61→  className,
    62→  contentClassName,
    63→  actions,
    64→  onEditorReady,
    65→}: MarkdownEditorProps) => {
    66→  const initialValueRef = useRef(value)
    67→  const lastMarkdownRef = useRef(value)
    68→
    69→  const initialConfig = useMemo(
    70→    () => ({
    71→      namespace: 'markdown-editor',
    72→      nodes: editorNodes,
    73→      onError(error: Error) {
    74→        throw error
    75→      },
    76→      editorState: () => {
    77→        if (!initialValueRef.current) return
    78→        $convertFromMarkdownString(
    79→          initialValueRef.current,
    80→          TRANSFORMERS,
    81→          undefined,
    82→          true,
    83→        )
    84→      },
    85→    }),
    86→    [],
    87→  )
    88→
    89→  return (
    90→    <LexicalComposer initialConfig={initialConfig}>
    91→      <div className={clsxm('markdown-editor', className)}>
    92→        <RichTextPlugin
    93→          contentEditable={
    94→            <ContentEditable
    95→              className={clsxm('markdown-editor__content', contentClassName)}
    96→              aria-label="Markdown editor"
    97→              spellCheck
    98→            />
    99→          }
   100→          placeholder={
   101→            placeholder ? (
   102→              <span className="markdown-editor__placeholder">
   103→                {placeholder}
   104→              </span>
   105→            ) : null
   106→          }
   107→          ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
   108→        />
   109→
   110→        <HistoryPlugin />
   111→        <ListPlugin />
   112→        <LinkPlugin />
   113→        <MarkdownShortcutPlugin transformers={TRANSFORMERS} />
   114→        <OnChangePlugin
   115→          onChange={(editorState: EditorState) => {
   116→            editorState.read(() => {
   117→              const markdown = $convertToMarkdownString(
   118→                TRANSFORMERS,
   119→                undefined,
   120→                true,
   121→              )
   122→              if (markdown === lastMarkdownRef.current) return
   123→              lastMarkdownRef.current = markdown
   124→              onChange(markdown)
   125→            })
   126→          }}
   127→        />
   128→        <EditorRefPlugin
   129→          onEditorReady={(editor) => {
   130→            onEditorReady?.(editor)
   131→          }}
   132→        />
   133→        <MarkdownSyncPlugin value={value} lastMarkdownRef={lastMarkdownRef} />
   134→        {!!onSubmit && <SubmitShortcutPlugin onSubmit={onSubmit} />}
   135→        {!!autoFocus && (
   136→          <AutoFocusPlugin
   137→            autoFocus={autoFocus}
   138→            scrollIntoView={scrollIntoView}
   139→          />
   140→        )}
   141→
   142→        {actions}
   143→      </div>
   144→    </LexicalComposer>
   145→  )
   146→}
   147→
   148→const EditorRefPlugin = ({
   149→  onEditorReady,
   150→}: {
   151→  onEditorReady?: (editor: LexicalEditor | null) => void
   152→}) => {
   153→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
   154→  useEffect(() => {
   155→    onEditorReady?.(editor)
   156→    return () => {
   157→      onEditorReady?.(null)
   158→    }
   159→  }, [editor, onEditorReady])
   160→  return null
   161→}
   162→
   163→const SubmitShortcutPlugin = ({ onSubmit }: { onSubmit: () => void }) => {
   164→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
   165→  useEffect(
   166→    () =>
   167→      editor.registerCommand<KeyboardEvent>(
   168→        KEY_ENTER_COMMAND,
   169→        (event) => {
   170→          if (!(event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey)) return false
   171→          event.preventDefault()
   172→          onSubmit()
   173→          return true
   174→        },
   175→        COMMAND_PRIORITY_HIGH,
   176→      ),
   177→    [editor, onSubmit],
   178→  )
   179→  return null
   180→}
   181→
   182→const MarkdownSyncPlugin = ({
   183→  value,
   184→  lastMarkdownRef,
   185→}: {
   186→  value: string
   187→  lastMarkdownRef: MutableRefObject<string>
   188→}) => {
   189→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
   190→  useEffect(() => {
   191→    if (value === lastMarkdownRef.current) return
   192→    lastMarkdownRef.current = value
   193→    editor.update(() => {
   194→      const root = $getRoot()
   195→      root.clear()
   196→      if (!value) return
   197→      $convertFromMarkdownString(value, TRANSFORMERS, undefined, true)
   198→    })
   199→  }, [editor, lastMarkdownRef, value])
   200→  return null
   201→}
   202→
   203→const AutoFocusPlugin = ({
   204→  autoFocus,
   205→  scrollIntoView,
   206→}: {
   207→  autoFocus: boolean
   208→  scrollIntoView?: boolean
   209→}) => {
   210→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()

   216→      rootElement?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' })
   217→    }

```md
# MarkdownPastePlugin Implementation Plan

## Context

The `@haklex/rich-editor` currently handles paste events only for images (via `ImageUploadPlugin`). When users paste Markdown text (e.g., from GitHub, documentation, or VS Code), it's inserted as plain text. This plugin auto-detects pasted Markdown and converts it to rich Lexical nodes, and also handles VS Code paste as code blocks.

## Architecture

### New File

- `haklex/rich-editor/src/plugins/MarkdownPastePlugin.tsx`

### Modified Files

- `haklex/rich-editor/src/components/RichEditor.tsx` — mount `<MarkdownPastePlugin />`
- `haklex/rich-editor/src/plugins/index.ts` — export plugin

## Plugin Design

Register `PASTE_COMMAND` at `COMMAND_PRIORITY_HIGH`. The handler follows this decision tree:

\```
PASTE_COMMAND received
├─ Has `vscode-editor-data` type?
│  └─ YES → Create CodeBlock node with language + code → return true
├─ Has `text/html` with real formatting?
│  └─ YES → return false (let Lexical default HTML paste handle)
├─ Get `text/plain`, run markdown detection
│  ├─ score >= threshold → convert markdown → insert nodes → return true
│  └─ score < threshold → return false (plain text paste)
└─ No text → return false
\```

### Step 1: VS Code Paste Detection

\```typescript
function getVSCodePasteData(clipboardData: DataTransfer): { language: string } | null {
  const raw = clipboardData.getData('vscode-editor-data')
  if (!raw) return null
  try {
    const data = JSON.parse(raw)
    return { language: data.mode || 'text' }
  } catch {
    return null
  }
}
\```

When detected: `$insertNodes([$createCodeBlockEditNode(plainText, language)])` → `return true`.

Use `$createCodeBlockEditNode` (not `$createCodeBlockNode`) since we're in the editor context. Import from `../nodes/CodeBlockEditNode`.

### Step 2: Rich HTML Check

\```typescript
function hasRichHTML(clipboardData: DataTransfer): boolean {
  const html = clipboardData.getData('text/html')
  if (!html) return false
  // VS Code HTML contains data-vscode attributes — not "rich"
  if (/data-vscode|vscode-/i.test(html)) return false
  // Check for formatting tags beyond bare <p>/<span>
  const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(html, 'text/html')
  const richTags = doc.body.querySelectorAll(
    'strong,em,b,i,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6,ul,ol,table,img,blockquote,pre>code,a[href]'
  )
  return richTags.length > 0
}
\```

If `hasRichHTML` → `return false` to let Lexical's built-in HTML→Lexical conversion handle it.

### Step 3: Markdown Detection (Scoring)

\```typescript
function detectMarkdown(text: string): boolean {
  let score = 0

  // High confidence (5 pts each)
  if (/^#{1,6}\s+\S/m.test(text)) score += 5          // ATX heading
  if (/^\```[\w-]*$/m.test(text)) score += 5            // Fenced code block
  if (/\[.+?\]\(.+?\)/.test(text)) score += 4          // Link
  if (/!\[.*?\]\(.+?\)/.test(text)) score += 5         // Image
  if (/^\|.+\|$/m.test(text) &&
      /^\|[-:\s|]+\|$/m.test(text)) score += 5         // Table
  if (/^>\s*\[!(NOTE|TIP|WARNING|CAUTION|IMPORTANT)\]/mi.test(text)) score += 5
  if (/^[-*]\s+\[[ x]\]/m.test(text)) score += 4      // Task list

  // Medium confidence (2 pts each)
  if (/\*\*.+?\*\*/.test(text)) score += 2             // Bold
  if (/(?<!\*)\*(?!\*)(?!\s).+?(?<!\s)(?<!\*)\*(?!\*)/.test(text)) score += 1
  if (/^[-*+]\s+\S/m.test(text)) score += 1            // Unordered list
  if (/^\d+\.\s+\S/m.test(text)) score += 1            // Ordered list
  if (/^>\s+\S/m.test(text)) score += 1                // Blockquote
  if (/`.+?`/.test(text)) score += 1                    // Inline code
  if (/^[-*_]{3,}$/m.test(text)) score += 2            // Horizontal rule

  // Structural signals
  const paragraphs = text.split(/\n{2,}/).filter(Boolean)
  if (paragraphs.length >= 3) score += 2               // Multi-paragraph

  // Negative signals
  if (text.length < 20) score -= 3
  if (!text.includes('\n')) score -= 2

  return score >= 5
}
\```

### Step 4: Markdown → Lexical Node Conversion

Use a temp editor to convert markdown, then serialize → deserialize into the real editor:

\```typescript
import { createEditor, $parseSerializedNode, $insertNodes } from 'lexical'
import { $convertFromMarkdownString } from '@lexical/markdown'
import { getResolvedEditNodes } from '../node-registry'
import { ALL_TRANSFORMERS } from '../transformers'

function convertAndInsert(editor: LexicalEditor, markdown: string): void {
  // Create temp editor with same node types
  const tempEditor = createEditor({
    namespace: 'markdown-paste-temp',
    nodes: getResolvedEditNodes(),
    onError: () => {},
  })

  // Synchronous conversion in temp editor
  tempEditor.update(
    () => { $convertFromMarkdownString(markdown, ALL_TRANSFORMERS) },
    { discrete: true },
  )

  // Serialize nodes from temp editor
  const serializedChildren = tempEditor.getEditorState().toJSON().root.children

  // Insert into real editor (already in editor.update context via PASTE_COMMAND)
  const nodes = serializedChildren.map((s) => $parseSerializedNode(s))
  $insertNodes(nodes)
}
\```

Key: `{ discrete: true }` makes `tempEditor.update()` synchronous. `$parseSerializedNode` runs in the real editor's context, so nodes are properly registered.

### Step 5: Plugin Component

\```typescript
export function MarkdownPastePlugin() {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()

  useEffect(() => {
    return editor.registerCommand(
      PASTE_COMMAND,
      (event) => {
        const clipboardData = 'clipboardData' in event
          ? (event as ClipboardEvent).clipboardData
          : null
        if (!clipboardData) return false

        // 1. VS Code paste → code block
        const vscodeData = getVSCodePasteData(clipboardData)
        if (vscodeData) {
          const code = clipboardData.getData('text/plain')
          if (code) {
            editor.update(() => {
              $insertNodes([$createCodeBlockEditNode(code, vscodeData.language)])
            })
            return true
          }
        }

        // 2. Rich HTML → let Lexical handle
        if (hasRichHTML(clipboardData)) return false

        // 3. Markdown detection
        const text = clipboardData.getData('text/plain')
        if (!text || !detectMarkdown(text)) return false

        // 4. Convert and insert
        event.preventDefault()
        convertAndInsert(editor, text)
        return true
      },
      COMMAND_PRIORITY_HIGH,
    )
  }, [editor])

  return null
}
\```

### Step 6: Mount in RichEditor

In `RichEditor.tsx`, add after `MarkdownShortcutsPlugin`:

\```tsx
<MarkdownPastePlugin />
\```

### Step 7: Export from plugins/index.ts

\```typescript
export { MarkdownPastePlugin } from './MarkdownPastePlugin'
\```

## Edge Cases Handled

| Case | Behavior |
|------|----------|
| VS Code paste | `vscode-editor-data` type → CodeBlock with language |
| Rich HTML (browser copy) | Skip, let Lexical HTML paste handle |
| VS Code HTML (syntax spans) | `data-vscode` marker → skip HTML, fall through to VS Code handler |
| Markdown text | Score >= 5 → convert via `$convertFromMarkdownString` |
| Plain text (not markdown) | Score < 5 → default paste |
| Short text / single line | Negative scoring → unlikely to trigger |
| Multi-paragraph markdown | `\n\n` separation adds +2 to score |
| Undo | Lexical `HistoryPlugin` handles automatically |
| Paste into middle of content | `$insertNodes` handles cursor-position insertion |
| Empty editor paste | Same flow — `$insertNodes` works on empty root |

## Verification

1. `pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor-demo dev` — open dev playground
2. Paste markdown text (e.g., a GitHub README) → should render as rich nodes
3. Paste from VS Code → should create code block with correct language
4. Paste plain text (no markdown syntax) → should insert as plain text
5. Paste rich HTML from browser → should use Lexical's HTML paste (not markdown)
6. Ctrl+Z after markdown paste → should revert to state before paste
7. Paste markdown into middle of existing content → should insert at cursor

```
